Use this template for PRs that update DELIVERY_PLAN.md or other planning docs.
Open with: ?template=planning-pr.md
-->

## Planning kind
<!-- One of: plan refresh / deep-review summary / scan-derived blocker list / capacity handoff pack -->

## Target product
<!-- e.g. SJMS-2.5, EquiSmile, HERM Platform, FHE-EPMC -->

## Summary
<!-- 3–5 sentences summarising what this plan revision changes and why. -->

## Evidence
<!-- Linked scan runs, UAT records, ledger entries, prior PRs. -->

## Diff Highlights
- [ ] Phase status updated
- [ ] Blocker list updated (add IDs of new/closed blockers)
- [ ] Exit criteria updated where evidence supports it
- [ ] Readiness score updated

## What this plan does NOT change
<!-- Be explicit. Example: "Phase 4 RBAC scope is unchanged." -->

## Owner approvals required
- [ ] Owner reviews and approves the plan diff
- [ ] No phase boundary changed without owner approval

## Rollback Plan
<!-- How to revert this revision if it turns out to be incorrect. -->

## Linked Issues
<!-- "Closes #..." for any planning-output issues this PR resolves. -->
